name: anchor-x402
description: Sixteen x402-paid services for AI agents on Base + Solana mainnet: nine commodity primitives (dual-chain hash anchoring, OFAC sanctions screening, signed decision attestation, mainnet tx decode, ENS/SNS resolution, USD spot price, EVM calldata decode, freeform datetime parsing, bundled wallet intelligence), one async due-diligence investigator ($7.77), one verifiable signed RNG (drop-in VRF for game studios), and five universal LLM endpoints (roast, oracle with on-chain anchored verdict, TL;DR, aura, grade). Plus a hosted chatbot at chat.anchor-x402.com. Pay-per-call USDC, no API keys, no accounts.

free_endpoints.description: Full OpenAPI 3 spec for all 16 paid services

routes.description: Anchor a 32-byte hash to Base + Solana mainnet in parallel. Returns both tx URLs as cryptographic proof of when the hash existed.

hash.description: Pre-computed 32-byte hex hash (64 chars, no 0x prefix). Mutually exclusive with `data`.

data.description: Arbitrary JSON to be canonicalized + SHA-256'd by the server. Mutually exclusive with `hash`.

note.description: Optional 200-char note returned in response (NOT on-chain).

routes.description: OFAC SDN sanctions + AML screening for any wallet address. Returns sanctions match boolean, flagged programs (Tornado Cash, Lazarus, etc.), risk level.

wallet.description: EVM 0x… (40 hex) or Solana base58 pubkey

routes.description: Verify a wallet signature over (input_hash, output_hash, decision) with domain separation, then dual-chain anchor the resulting Merkle root. Returns verified signer + on-chain proof.
Structured decode of any mainnet transaction. EVM (Base/Ethereum): from/to/value/gas/status/calldata. Solana: slot/fee/signers/program_calls.
Cross-chain name resolution: ENS (.eth) and Bonfida SNS (.sol). Returns resolved address(es) per registry.
USD spot price for any major token by symbol or chain+contract. CoinGecko-backed, 60s cache.

symbol.description: Token symbol (BTC, ETH, etc.). Mutually exclusive with chain+contract.

chain.description: Chain slug: base, ethereum, solana, polygon, arbitrum, optimism, bsc, avalanche.

contract.description: Token contract address. Required with chain.

routes.description: Decode raw EVM calldata into function name + typed parameters via openchain.xyz signature directory + eth_abi.

calldata_hex.description: Raw EVM calldata, with or without 0x prefix

routes.description: Parse any freeform datetime string into structured ISO 8601 + components + relative time + confidence.
Unified wallet intelligence bundle. ONE call returns balances on Base + Ethereum + Solana, USDC across chains, tx counts, ENS/SNS reverse, sanctions verdict — aggregated from 8-10 parallel sources.

Agent-driven wallet due diligence. Multi-step LLM investigation: sanctions screen, on-chain history, identity correlation, counterparty graph. Delivered as signed markdown report + JSON sidecar with dual-chain anchor proof on Base + Solana. Async — returns job_id, poll /v1/investigate/status/{job_id}. ETA 5-10 min.

address.description: EVM 0x… or Solana base58 pubkey to investigate

routes.description: Witty roast of any target — wallet, tweet, idea, code, anything. Powered by Claude on AWS Bedrock. Universal text input.
Yes/no oracle with dual-chain anchored verdict on Base + Solana. Returns MAYBE/YES/NO + explanation + on-chain proof (merkle_root, base_tx, solana_tx).
Summarize a URL (fetched server-side) or pasted text into 3-5 concise bullets. Powered by Claude on AWS Bedrock.

text.description: Pasted text to summarize. Provide either text or url.

url.description: URL to fetch and summarize. Provide either text or url.

routes.description: Aura read of any target. Returns color (free-form), tier (S/A/B/C/D/F), score (0-9999), description. Screenshot-friendly viral output.

target.description: Anything to read the aura of

routes.description: Academic letter grade with red-pen marginalia for anything. Returns letter_grade (A-F), marginalia bullets, summary.

Cryptographically-random integer(s) over a caller-chosen range, signed by the treasury EOA (EIP-191). Drop-in VRF for game studios, raffles, DAO voter selection, NFT mint reveals. Optional 32-byte pre-commitment binds inputs into the signed payload to close front-running windows.

high.description: Inclusive high bound. Must be >= low.

commitment.description: Optional 32-byte hex pre-commitment included in the signed payload.

label.description: Optional caller tag included in the signed payload.
